verses.latin_vulgate: Deus noster refugium et virtus ;  adjutor in tribulationibus quæ invenerunt nos nimis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהִ֣ים לָ֭נוּ מַחֲסֶ֣ה וָעֹ֑ז עֶזְרָ֥ה בְ֝צָר֗וֹת נִמְצָ֥א מְאֹֽד׃
verses.king_james: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propterea non timebimus dum turbabitur terra,  et transferentur montes in cor maris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַל־כֵּ֣ן לֹֽא־נִ֭ירָא בְּהָמִ֣יר אָ֑רֶץ וּבְמ֥וֹט הָ֝רִ֗ים בְּלֵ֣ב יַמִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: Therefore will not we fear, though the earth be removed, and though the mountains be carried into the midst of the sea;

verses.latin_vulgate: Sonuerunt, et turbatæ sunt aquæ eorum ;  conturbati sunt montes in fortitudine ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֶהֱמ֣וּ יֶחְמְר֣וּ מֵימָ֑יו יִ֥רְעֲשֽׁוּ־הָרִ֖ים בְּגַאֲוָת֣וֹ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: Though the waters thereof roar and be troubled, though the mountains shake with the swelling thereof. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fluminis impetus lætificat civitatem Dei :  sanctificavit tabernaculum suum Altissimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָהָ֗ר פְּלָגָ֗יו יְשַׂמְּח֥וּ עִיר־אֱלֹהִ֑ים קְ֝דֹ֗שׁ מִשְׁכְּנֵ֥י עֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: There is a river, the streams whereof shall make glad the city of God, the holy place of the tabernacles of the most High.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus in medio ejus, non commovebitur ;  adjuvabit eam Deus mane diluculo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּ֭קִרְבָּהּ בַּל־תִּמּ֑וֹט יַעְזְרֶ֥הָ אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים לִפְנ֥וֹת בֹּֽקֶר׃
verses.king_james: God is in the midst of her; she shall not be moved: God shall help her, and that right early.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conturbatæ sunt gentes, et inclinata sunt regna :  dedit vocem suam, mota est terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָמ֣וּ ג֭וֹיִם מָ֣טוּ מַמְלָכ֑וֹת נָתַ֥ן בְּ֝קוֹל֗וֹ תָּמ֥וּג אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: The heathen raged, the kingdoms were moved: he uttered his voice, the earth melted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus virtutum nobiscum ;  susceptor noster Deus Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֣וֹת עִמָּ֑נוּ מִשְׂגָּֽב־לָ֨נוּ אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our refuge. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venite, et videte opera Domini,  quæ posuit prodigia super terram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽכוּ־חֲ֭זוּ מִפְעֲל֣וֹת יְהֹוָ֑ה אֲשֶׁר־שָׂ֖ם שַׁמּ֣וֹת בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Come, behold the works of the Lord, what desolations he hath made in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: auferens bella usque ad finem terræ.  Arcum conteret, et confringet arma,  et scuta comburet igni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשְׁבִּ֥ית מִלְחָמוֹת֮ עַד־קְצֵ֢ה הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ קֶ֣שֶׁת יְ֭שַׁבֵּר וְקִצֵּ֣ץ חֲנִ֑ית עֲ֝גָל֗וֹת יִשְׂרֹ֥ף בָּאֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; he breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; he burneth the chariot in the fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vacate, et videte quoniam ego sum Deus ;  exaltabor in gentibus, et exaltabor in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַרְפּ֣וּ וּ֭דְעוּ כִּֽי־אָנֹכִ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים אָר֥וּם בַּ֝גּוֹיִ֗ם אָר֥וּם בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the heathen, I will be exalted in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus virtutum nobiscum ;  susceptor noster Deus Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֣וֹת עִמָּ֑נוּ מִשְׂגָּֽב־לָ֨נוּ אֱלֹהֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֣ב סֶֽלָה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The Lord of hosts is with us; the God of Jacob is our refuge. Selah.
